Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: A customer portfolio document containing RFM scores and risk status

id.description: The unique ID of the customer

name.description: The company name of the client

segment.description: The commercial segment of the client (Enterprise, Mid-Market, SMB)

recency.description: The number of days since the last contact

monetary.description: The financial value of the contract

status.description: The action status of the customer (Pending, Contacted, Declined)

ActionLog.title: ActionLog
ActionLog.description: An action or engagement log entry showing communication with a customer

id.description: The unique ID of the action log

timestamp.description: The timestamp of when the action was recorded

type.description: The type or channel of communication (Email Outreach, Call, Meeting, etc.)

officer.description: The officer who completed the outreach

impact.description: The financial value of the contract saved or at risk

status.description: The result status of the action

ScoringConfig.title: ScoringConfig
ScoringConfig.description: Configuration thresholds for calculations of risk categories

freqMultiplier.description: The multiplier applied to frequency scores

highScoreThreshold.description: The threshold for high risk classification

FeedbackItem.title: FeedbackItem
FeedbackItem.description: A feedback item submitted by users

/customers/{customerId}.description: The collection of client customer records

/actions/{actionId}.description: The collection of action or outreach log events

/feedbacks/{feedbackId}.description: User feedbacks submitted via the app portal
